### 1. MARKET OVERVIEW
The overall market is predominantly in a distribution phase, with most tokens experiencing minimal price and volume changes. The accumulation phase is less common, with only a few tokens like WORK and CLANKER currently in this phase.

There are no significant price or volume movements reported for any of the tokens, as all price deltas and volume deltas are 0%.
